description_long: This hamburger features a soft, golden-brown plain bun with a slightly glossy finish and a gentle dome shape. The top bun sits atop a thick beef patty, which is partially visible and topped with melted cheddar cheese, crispy fried onions, and strips of bacon. Leafy lettuce and a layer of mayonnaise or sauce are visible at the edges, adding color and texture contrast. The cheese is melted and drapes over the patty and toppings, while the fried onions provide a crunchy texture. The bottom bun is slightly compressed, holding the ingredients together. No packaging or sesame seeds are present, and the overall appearance is appetizing and freshly assembled.
description: A golden-brown plain hamburger bun encases a beef patty with melted cheddar cheese, bacon, fried onions, lettuce, and sauce. The burger looks fresh, with visible layers and no packaging.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hamburger's open side with visible beef patty, melted cheese, fried onions, bacon, lettuce, and sauce peeking out.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the thick bun and a generous amount of fried onions and bacon spilling out, with lettuce and sauce at the edge.
description_view_2: The rear view mostly shows the top bun and a bit of lettuce and cheese, with minimal toppings visible.
description_view_3: This angled view displays the melted cheese, lettuce, and a hint of bacon and fried onions beneath the bun.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Fried onions and bacon are layered above the patty, with melted cheddar cheese draped over them. Lettuce and sauce are distributed at the edges, visible beneath the top bun.
